parameters.query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE status='active' AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS') AS total_usuarios,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_users WHERE registered=true AND status='active' AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS') AS registrados,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS activos,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS total_respuestas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct=TRUE AND is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS correctas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_correct=FALSE AND is_duplicate=FALSE AND is_out_of_time=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS')) AS incorrectas,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_goals),0) FROM ct_users WHERE status='active' AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS') AS goles_totales,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE status='sent') AS trivias_activas,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE status IN ('sent','closed','settled')) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ct_trivias WHERE status='sent') AS trivias_sin_actividad

SELECT rank_general, name, agent_name, total_goals, correct_count, total_responses, ROUND(avg_speed_seconds::numeric / 60, 1) AS vel_min FROM v_ct_rankings WHERE status='active' AND agent_name!='PRUEBAS' AND total_responses>0 ORDER BY total_goals DESC, avg_speed_seconds ASC NULLS LAST LIMIT 5

SELECT u.agent_name, COUNT(DISTINCT u.user_id) AS participantes, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN u.registered THEN u.user_id END) AS registrados, COALESCE(SUM(u.total_goals), 0) AS goles, COUNT(r.response_id) AS respuestas, CASE WHEN COUNT(r.response_id) > 0 THEN ROUND(COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_correct THEN 1 END)::numeric / COUNT(r.response_id) * 100) ELSE 0 END AS pct_acierto FROM ct_users u LEFT JOIN ct_trivia_responses r ON u.user_id = r.user_id AND r.is_duplicate = FALSE WHERE u.status = 'active' AND u.agent_name IS NOT NULL AND u.agent_name != 'PRUEBAS' GROUP BY u.agent_name ORDER BY goles DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE(responded_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota') AS dia, COUNT(*) AS respuestas, SUM(CASE WHEN is_correct THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS correctas FROM ct_trivia_responses WHERE is_duplicate=FALSE AND user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS') GROUP BY dia ORDER BY dia ASC

SELECT t.trivia_number, t.question, t.sent_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota' AS sent_bogota, t.closes_at AT TIME ZONE 'America/Bogota' AS closes_bogota, COUNT(r.response_id) AS respuestas, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.is_correct THEN 1 END) AS correctas FROM ct_trivias t LEFT JOIN ct_trivia_responses r ON t.trivia_id = r.trivia_id AND r.is_duplicate=FALSE AND r.user_id NOT IN (SELECT user_id FROM ct_users WHERE agent_name='PRUEBAS') WHERE t.status IN ('sent','closed','settled') GROUP BY t.trivia_id, t.trivia_number, t.question, t.sent_at, t.closes_at ORDER BY t.trivia_number

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Preparar Contexto').first().json; const claudeResp = $input.first().json; // Parsear respuesta de Claude let analisis = {general:'', trivia:'', ranking:'', agente:'', proyeccion:''}; try { const content = claudeResp.content?.[0]?.text || '{}'; const parsed = JSON.parse(content); analisis = {...analisis, ...parsed}; } catch(e) { analisis.general = 'Análisis no disponible.'; } const {kpis, top5, topAgent, trivias, proyeccion, fechaReporte, fechaCorta, tasaAcierto, tasaPart} = ctx; // Helper para filas del ranking const rankRow = (pos, p, highlight) => { if (!p) return `${pos}°Sin datos`; const color = highlight ? '#333' : '#aaa'; const size = highlight ? '13px' : '12px'; const vel = p.vel_min ? `${p.vel_min} min` : '—'; return ` ${pos}° ${p.name} ${p.agent_name||'—'} ${p.total_goals} ${p.correct_count} ${vel} `; }; // Trivias rows const triviaRows = trivias.map(t => ` Trivia #${t.trivia_number}
${t.respuestas} `).join(''); // Proyección texto const projText = proyeccion ? `
📈 Proyección día 37: ${proyeccion.pred37} respuestas acumuladas · R²=${proyeccion.r2}% · SE±${proyeccion.se}
` : `
Insuficientes datos para proyección (se necesitan ≥2 días de actividad).
`; // Alerta trivia activa const triviaActiva = trivias.find(t => t.respuestas >= 0); const alertaTrivia = triviaActiva ? `Trivia #${triviaActiva.trivia_number} activa. Ya van ${triviaActiva.respuestas} respuestas registradas hoy.` : 'No hay trivias activas en este momento.'; const logoUrl = 'https://nodo.host/crack-tesos/images/logo-nodo.png'; const dashUrl = 'https://nodo.host/crack-tesos/dashboard.html'; const html = `
  CRACK TESOS 2026 Analytics Daily · ${fechaReporte}
✉ Crack Tesos 2026  ·  Reporte diario — ${fechaCorta}
⚠️ ${alertaTrivia}
✉ Actividad General — ${fechaCorta}
${kpis.total_usuarios}
Participantes Activos
${kpis.total_respuestas}
Respuestas Registradas
${kpis.goles_totales}
Goles Acumulados ⚽
${tasaAcierto}
Tasa de Acierto
${kpis.correctas}✅ / ${kpis.incorrectas}❌
${analisis.general}
🏆 Ranking General — Top 5
${analisis.ranking}
${rankRow('1', top5[0], true)} ${rankRow('2', top5[1], true)} ${rankRow('3', top5[2], false)} ${rankRow('4', top5[3], false)} ${rankRow('5', top5[4], false)}
#ParticipanteAgenteGoles ⚽CorrectasVel.
📋 Actividad por Trivia
${analisis.trivia}
${triviaRows}
🏢 Agente Líder del Día
${analisis.agente}
${topAgent.agent_name||'—'} ${topAgent.participantes} part. ${topAgent.registrados} reg. ${topAgent.goles} ⚽ ${topAgent.pct_acierto}%
📈 Proyección de Participación
${analisis.proyeccion}
${projText}
📊 Ver Dashboard Completo →
Powered by NODO · v1.6 · 2026 · www.nodo.live
Reporte automático generado por NODO · Crack Tesos 2026 · Bogotá, Colombia
`; return [{json: { html, subject: `⚽ Crack Tesos 2026 — Reporte del ${ctx.fechaCorta}`, fechaCorta: ctx.fechaCorta }}];
